problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
